## Issue Type

- [ ] Bug report — something in the guides is wrong or misleading
- [ ] Enhancement — something is missing and should be added
- [ ] New guide request — a topic not covered in the 8-step process
- [ ] Skill template — a reusable skill to add to /skills/
- [ ] Shoot example — a completed shoot plan (anonymized) to add as a reference
- [ ] Other

---

## Description

Describe the issue or suggestion.

---

## Context

What part of the workshop does this relate to? (e.g., Step 4 Shot List, Anxiety Management, Angle System)

---

## Current State

What currently exists that needs to change?

---

## Suggested Change

What should be different?

---

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, screenshots, or examples?
